name: Orange Cheesecake with Strawberries
recipeInstructions:
-------------
- CHEESECAKE:
16 oz Low-fat cottage cheese
8 oz Light cream cheese (at room temperature)
1/3 cup Sugar
2 tbsp All-purpose flour
2 tbsp Orange juice
1 1/2 tsp Grated orange rind (colored part only)
1 tsp Vanilla extract
1 Large Navel orange, sectioned and membranes removed
1 pint Strawberries, sliced thinly
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F. Mix the vanilla wafers and cinnamon in a bowl.
2. Whisk the egg white until foamy and combine it with the crumbs using a fork.
3. Spray a 9-inch springform pan with cooking spray. Press the mixture evenly into the bottom of the prepared pan and bake for 10 minutes. Let cool.
4. Lower the oven temperature to 300°F. Combine the cottage cheese, cream cheese, sugar, flour, orange juice, orange rind, and vanilla extract in a food processor until smooth. Pour into the crust and spread evenly.
5. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes or until set in the center. Remove from the oven and let cool completely. Refrigerate until serving.
6. Just before serving, top each slice with orange sections and sliced strawberries.
